section.div: Convert PDFs, EPUBs, DOCX, DOC, and TXT files into high-quality audiobooks using **Qwen3 TTS Voice Model** - an open-source voice synthesis system that excels at natural speech generation and voice cloning.
Installation script for DHH's Omarchy on top of CachyOS. (Read the README.md before proceeding!)
